description_long: This object is a pair of pliers featuring two elongated, slightly curved handles coated in a bright red material, likely for insulation and improved grip. The handles converge at a robust, black metallic pivot joint, which allows the two arms to open and close smoothly. The jaws are broad and flat, with a squared-off tip and a wide, U-shaped opening, designed for gripping or manipulating flat or thick objects. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the metal jaws and pivot mechanism providing significant leverage and strength. The red handles are smooth and rounded, offering comfort during prolonged use. No visible branding or logos are present on the surface.
description: A sturdy pair of pliers with red insulated handles and broad, flat black jaws, designed for gripping or manipulating objects. The handles are smooth and slightly curved for comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red handles and the flat, squared-off black jaws.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, U-shaped opening of the jaws and the curvature of the handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handles and the thickness of the jaw section.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open jaws and the inside curvature of the handles.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, insulated handles with a smooth, rounded profile for ergonomic grip.
attribute_jaw_design: Flat, squared jaws with a wide U-shaped opening, optimized for gripping flat or thick objects; lacks serrations or wire-cutting features.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint allowing standard opening and closing motion; no adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth plastic coating on handles, no visible ribbing or knurling.
